default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy to improve traffic quality and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New CTA on tool pages:** Add a CTA next to the tool's image to capture user intent immediately, a high-impact, low-effort change.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [**Shift content focus to ITSM:** Prioritize ITSM/Service Desk keywords over Help Desk to attract more qualified traffic and reduce churn.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - **Address low blog performance:** Investigate why nearly all blog posts get \<100 clicks in 6 months and develop a plan to improve.
  - [**Create "Siit Alternatives" page:** Launch a high-performing page type to pitch Siit first, a strategy proven effective at Scribe.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Low Engagement & High Churn

  - [A marketing audit revealed two key issues:](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Low Engagement:** High first-time visitor traffic from tools/blog, but low returning visitors and pages-per-session.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**High Churn:** Customers on the basic Help Desk plan churn at a higher rate than those on ITSM/AI plans.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Solution 1: Content Strategy Shift

  - [**Decision:** Prioritize content targeting ITSM and Service Desk keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Attracts higher-quality leads who are more likely to convert and retain, even if it means less overall traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will revise the editorial roadmap to align with this new focus.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### Solution 2: New CTA on Tool Pages

  - [**Decision:** Add a CTA next to the tool's image on review pages (e.g., Linear).](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Captures user intent immediately, offering a natural next step for users who just read about an integration.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will implement the change via a Webflow developer.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

### Solution 3: "Siit Alternatives" Page

  - [**Decision:** Create a "Siit Alternatives" page to pitch Siit first, then list competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This page type was a top performer at Scribe, proving its effectiveness for direct conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will draft the page for Carmel's review.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### Other Content Updates

  - [**Listicles:**](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [Include Siit integrations at the top.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [Include major legacy competitors (e.g., Freshservice) for comprehensive coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [Remove European competitors, as the market is not a focus.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [**New CTA Copy:**](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [**Decision:** Use "Connect to Slack" over "Connect to Slack or Teams."](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [**Rationale:** 75% of customers use the Slack integration, making the copy more punchy and relevant to the majority.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
      - [Share the marketing audit findings (document or Loom).](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
      - [Provide the final CTA design by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [Implement the new CTA on existing tool pages via a Webflow developer.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [Draft the "Siit Alternatives" page for Carmel's review.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
      - [Revise the editorial roadmap to prioritize ITSM/Service Desk keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/d_xstUyUrjooJ-wtV3HgDhVpoX9xS_sM?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - Investigate the low blog click-through rates (\<100 clicks/6 months) and report findings next week.

action_items.description: Watch Jacob's influencer Looms; send async feedback
Create Siit review + alternatives; send to Carmel for review
Share marketing audit findings doc + Loom w/ Matt (cc Jacob)
Update editorial roadmap to prioritize service desk/ITSM; deprioritize help desk
Implement image + CTA on tool pages; add to existing integration reviews
Confirm CTA wording w/ Jacob (Slack vs Slack + Teams)
Analyze blog click data; share findings w/ Carmel
